dashboard.label: Ping Monitor Overview
dashboard.description: Enterprise network endpoint availability and latency monitoring - supports Events, Metrics, or Combined data sources

search.query: | inputlookup ping_monitor_settings_lookup | search _key="global" | head 1 | eval found="yes" | append [| makeresults | eval index="ping", sourcetype="ping_monitor", metrics_index="ping_metrics", found="no"] | head 1 | eval index=if(found=="yes", index, "ping") | eval sourcetype=if(found=="yes", sourcetype, "ping_monitor") | eval metrics_index=if(found=="yes", metrics_index, "ping_metrics") | fields index, sourcetype, metrics_index, found
| map maxsearches=1 search="search index=\"$result.index$\" sourcetype=\"$result.sourcetype$\" record_type=summary | stats count by group | fields group | sort group"
| map maxsearches=1 search="search index=\"$result.index$\" sourcetype=\"$result.sourcetype$\" record_type=summary | stats count by hostname | fields hostname | sort hostname"

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats latest(_time) as last_seen, latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss, latest(avg_latency_ms) as latency, values(group) as group, values(description) as description by hostname, target_ip | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval status=case(packet_loss==0, "✅ Healthy", packet_loss<50, "⚠️ Degraded", packet_loss<100, "🔶 Critical", true(), "❌ Down") | eval latency=if(latency>0, round(latency,2)." ms", "N/A") | eval packet_loss=packet_loss."%" | table status, hostname, target_ip, group, description, packet_loss, latency, last_seen | rename status as Status, hostname as Hostname, target_ip as "IP Address", group as Group, description as Description, packet_loss as "Packet Loss", latency as "Latency", last_seen as "Last Seen" | sort Hostname

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats latest(_time) as last_seen, latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss, latest(avg_latency_ms) as latency, values(group) as group, values(description) as description, values(entitytype) as entitytype, values(device) as device, values(vendor) as vendor by hostname, target_ip | where packet_loss > 0 | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval status=case(packet_loss<50, "⚠️ Degraded", packet_loss<100, "🔶 Critical", true(), "❌ Down") | eval latency=if(latency>0, round(latency,2)." ms", "N/A") | eval packet_loss_display=packet_loss."%" | table status, hostname, target_ip, group, entitytype, device, vendor, description, packet_loss_display, latency, last_seen | rename status as Status, hostname as Hostname, target_ip as "IP Address", group as Group, entitytype as "Entity Type", device as Device, vendor as Vendor, description as Description, packet_loss_display as "Packet Loss", latency as "Latency", last_seen as "Last Seen" | sort -packet_loss

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats latest(_time) as last_seen, latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss, latest(avg_latency_ms) as latency, values(group) as group by hostname, target_ip | eval loss_bucket=case( packet_loss==0, "0% (No Loss)", packet_loss>0 AND packet_loss<=25, "1-25%", packet_loss>25 AND packet_loss<=50, "26-50%", packet_loss>50 AND packet_loss<=75, "51-75%", packet_loss>75 AND packet_loss<100, "76-99%", packet_loss==100, "100% (Total Loss)" ) | where loss_bucket="$drilldown_loss_bucket$" | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval latency=if(latency>0, round(latency,2)." ms", "N/A") | eval packet_loss=packet_loss."%" | table hostname, target_ip, group, packet_loss, latency, last_seen | rename hostname as Hostname, target_ip as "IP Address", group as Group, packet_loss as "Packet Loss", latency as "Latency", last_seen as "Last Seen" | sort Hostname
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats dc(target_ip) as total_endpoints

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats sum(pings_successful) as success, sum(pings_sent) as total | eval availability=round((success/total)*100, 2) | fields availability

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) avg_latency_ms>0 | stats avg(avg_latency_ms) as avg_latency | eval avg_latency=round(avg_latency, 2)

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss by hostname | where packet_loss > 0 | stats count as hosts_with_issues
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | timechart span=5m avg(eval(100-packet_loss_pct)) as availability by group

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) avg_latency_ms>0 | timechart span=5m avg(avg_latency_ms) as avg_latency, max(max_latency_ms) as max_latency, min(min_latency_ms) as min_latency

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) avg_latency_ms>0 | stats avg(avg_latency_ms) as avg_latency, max(max_latency_ms) as max_latency, min(min_latency_ms) as min_latency by hostname | sort -avg_latency | head 20
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | timechart span=5m avg(packet_loss_pct) as avg_packet_loss by hostname

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | eval loss_bucket=case( packet_loss_pct==0, "0% (No Loss)", packet_loss_pct>0 AND packet_loss_pct<=25, "1-25%", packet_loss_pct>25 AND packet_loss_pct<=50, "26-50%", packet_loss_pct>50 AND packet_loss_pct<=75, "51-75%", packet_loss_pct>75 AND packet_loss_pct<100, "76-99%", packet_loss_pct==100, "100% (Total Loss)" ) | stats count by loss_bucket | sort loss_bucket

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats latest(_time) as last_check_epoch, latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss, latest(avg_latency_ms) as avg_latency, latest(min_latency_ms) as min_latency, latest(max_latency_ms) as max_latency, latest(pings_successful) as last_success, latest(pings_sent) as last_sent, values(group) as group, values(description) as description, values(entitytype) as entitytype, values(device) as device, values(vendor) as vendor by hostname, target_ip | eval last_check=strftime(last_check_epoch, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval status=case( packet_loss==0, "Healthy", packet_loss>0 AND packet_loss<50, "Degraded", packet_loss>=50 AND packet_loss<100, "Critical", packet_loss==100, "Down" ) | eval status_icon=case( status=="Healthy", "✅", status=="Degraded", "⚠️", status=="Critical", "🔶", status=="Down", "❌" ) | eval display_status=status_icon." ".status | eval avg_latency=if(avg_latency>0, round(avg_latency, 2)." ms", "N/A") | eval min_latency=if(min_latency>0, round(min_latency, 2)." ms", "N/A") | eval max_latency=if(max_latency>0, round(max_latency, 2)." ms", "N/A") | eval packet_loss=packet_loss."%" | table display_status, hostname, target_ip, group, entitytype, device, vendor, description, packet_loss, avg_latency, min_latency, max_latency, last_check | rename display_status as Status | sort status

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats sum(pings_successful) as success, sum(pings_sent) as total by group | eval availability=round((success/total)*100, 2) | fields group, availability | sort -availability
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats dc(hostname) as host_count by group | sort -host_count

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=ping ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | eval status_icon=if(status=="success", "✅", "❌") | eval latency_display=if(latency_ms>0, latency_ms." ms", "N/A") | table timestamp, status_icon, hostname, target_ip, group, latency_display, ttl, error_message | rename status_icon as Status, latency_display as Latency, error_message as "Error Message" | sort -timestamp | head 100

| mstats latest("ping.packet_loss_pct") as packet_loss, latest("ping.avg_latency_ms") as latency WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname, target_ip, group | eval status=case(packet_loss==0, "✅ Healthy", packet_loss<50, "⚠️ Degraded", packet_loss<100, "🔶 Critical", true(), "❌ Down") | eval latency=if(latency>0, round(latency,2)." ms", "N/A") | eval packet_loss=packet_loss."%" | table status, hostname, target_ip, group, packet_loss, latency | rename status as Status, hostname as Hostname, target_ip as "IP Address", group as Group, packet_loss as "Packet Loss", latency as "Latency" | sort Hostname

| mstats latest("ping.packet_loss_pct") as packet_loss, latest("ping.avg_latency_ms") as latency WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname, target_ip, group | where packet_loss > 0 | eval status=case(packet_loss<50, "⚠️ Degraded", packet_loss<100, "🔶 Critical", true(), "❌ Down") | eval latency=if(latency>0, round(latency,2)." ms", "N/A") | eval packet_loss=packet_loss."%" | table status, hostname, target_ip, group, packet_loss, latency | rename status as Status, hostname as Hostname, target_ip as "IP Address", group as Group, packet_loss as "Packet Loss", latency as "Latency" | sort -packet_loss
| mstats count("ping.pings_sent") as count WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname | stats dc(hostname) as total_endpoints

| mstats sum("ping.pings_successful") as success, sum("ping.pings_sent") as total WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ | eval availability=round((success/total)*100, 2) | fields availability
| mstats avg("ping.avg_latency_ms") as avg_latency WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ | eval avg_latency=round(avg_latency, 2)

| mstats latest("ping.packet_loss_pct") as packet_loss WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname | where packet_loss > 0 | stats count as hosts_with_issues

| mstats avg("ping.packet_loss_pct") as packet_loss WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY group span=5m | eval availability=100-packet_loss | timechart span=5m values(availability) as availability by group

| mstats avg("ping.avg_latency_ms") as avg_latency, max("ping.max_latency_ms") as max_latency, min("ping.min_latency_ms") as min_latency WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ span=5m

| mstats avg("ping.avg_latency_ms") as avg_latency, max("ping.max_latency_ms") as max_latency, min("ping.min_latency_ms") as min_latency WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname | sort -avg_latency | head 20
| mstats avg("ping.packet_loss_pct") as packet_loss WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname span=5m

| mstats avg("ping.packet_loss_pct") as packet_loss_pct WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname | eval loss_bucket=case( packet_loss_pct==0, "0% (No Loss)", packet_loss_pct>0 AND packet_loss_pct<=25, "1-25%", packet_loss_pct>25 AND packet_loss_pct<=50, "26-50%", packet_loss_pct>50 AND packet_loss_pct<=75, "51-75%", packet_loss_pct>75 AND packet_loss_pct<100, "76-99%", packet_loss_pct==100, "100% (Total Loss)" ) | stats count by loss_bucket | sort loss_bucket

| mstats latest("ping.packet_loss_pct") as packet_loss, latest("ping.avg_latency_ms") as latency WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname, target_ip, group | eval loss_bucket=case( packet_loss==0, "0% (No Loss)", packet_loss>0 AND packet_loss<=25, "1-25%", packet_loss>25 AND packet_loss<=50, "26-50%", packet_loss>50 AND packet_loss<=75, "51-75%", packet_loss>75 AND packet_loss<100, "76-99%", packet_loss==100, "100% (Total Loss)" ) | where loss_bucket="$drilldown_loss_bucket_metrics$" | eval status=case(packet_loss==0, "✅ Healthy", packet_loss<50, "⚠️ Degraded", packet_loss<100, "🔶 Critical", true(), "❌ Down") | eval latency=if(latency>0, round(latency,2)." ms", "N/A") | eval packet_loss=packet_loss."%" | table status, hostname, target_ip, group, packet_loss, latency | rename status as Status, hostname as Hostname, target_ip as "IP Address", group as Group, packet_loss as "Packet Loss", latency as "Latency"

| mstats latest("ping.packet_loss_pct") as packet_loss, latest("ping.avg_latency_ms") as avg_latency, latest("ping.min_latency_ms") as min_latency, latest("ping.max_latency_ms") as max_latency, latest("ping.pings_successful") as last_success, latest("ping.pings_sent") as last_sent WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname, target_ip, group | eval last_check=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval status=case( packet_loss==0, "Healthy", packet_loss>0 AND packet_loss<50, "Degraded", packet_loss>=50 AND packet_loss<100, "Critical", packet_loss==100, "Down" ) | eval status_icon=case( status=="Healthy", "✅", status=="Degraded", "⚠️", status=="Critical", "🔶", status=="Down", "❌" ) | eval display_status=status_icon." ".status | eval avg_latency=if(avg_latency>0, round(avg_latency, 2)." ms", "N/A") | eval min_latency=if(min_latency>0, round(min_latency, 2)." ms", "N/A") | eval max_latency=if(max_latency>0, round(max_latency, 2)." ms", "N/A") | eval packet_loss=packet_loss."%" | table display_status, hostname, target_ip, group, packet_loss, avg_latency, min_latency, max_latency, last_check | rename display_status as Status | sort status

| mstats sum("ping.pings_successful") as success, sum("ping.pings_sent") as total WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY group | eval availability=round((success/total)*100, 2) | fields group, availability | sort -availability

| mstats count("ping.pings_sent") as count WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname, group | stats dc(hostname) as host_count by group | sort -host_count

div.p: Combined View: Showing data from both Events (index: $pm_index$) and Metrics (index: $pm_metrics_index$) sources side by side for comparison.

search.query: index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats dc(target_ip) as total_endpoints
| mstats count("ping.pings_sent") as count WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname | stats dc(hostname) as total_endpoints

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats sum(pings_successful) as success, sum(pings_sent) as total | eval availability=round((success/total)*100, 2) | fields availability

| mstats sum("ping.pings_successful") as success, sum("ping.pings_sent") as total WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ | eval availability=round((success/total)*100, 2) | fields availability

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) avg_latency_ms>0 | stats avg(avg_latency_ms) as avg_latency | eval avg_latency=round(avg_latency, 2)
| mstats avg("ping.avg_latency_ms") as avg_latency WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ | eval avg_latency=round(avg_latency, 2)

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss by hostname | where packet_loss > 0 | stats count as hosts_with_issues

| mstats latest("ping.packet_loss_pct") as packet_loss WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" $selected_groups_metrics$ $selected_hosts_metrics$ BY hostname | where packet_loss > 0 | stats count as hosts_with_issues

panel.title: 📊 Availability Over Time - Events vs Metrics Comparison

search.query: index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | timechart span=5m avg(eval(100-packet_loss_pct)) as "Events Availability" | join type=outer _time [| mstats avg("ping.packet_loss_pct") as packet_loss WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" span=5m | eval "Metrics Availability"=100-packet_loss | fields _time "Metrics Availability"] | fillnull value=0

panel.title: 📊 Average Latency Over Time - Events vs Metrics Comparison

search.query: index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) avg_latency_ms>0 | timechart span=5m avg(avg_latency_ms) as "Events Avg Latency", max(max_latency_ms) as "Events Max Latency" | join type=outer _time [| mstats avg("ping.avg_latency_ms") as "Metrics Avg Latency", max("ping.max_latency_ms") as "Metrics Max Latency" WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" span=5m | fields _time "Metrics Avg Latency" "Metrics Max Latency"] | fillnull value=0

panel.title: 📊 Packet Loss Over Time - Events vs Metrics Comparison

search.query: index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | timechart span=5m avg(packet_loss_pct) as "Events Packet Loss" | join type=outer _time [| mstats avg("ping.packet_loss_pct") as "Metrics Packet Loss" WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" span=5m | fields _time "Metrics Packet Loss"] | fillnull value=0

panel.title: 📊 Host Status Comparison - Events vs Metrics

search.query: index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as events_loss, latest(avg_latency_ms) as events_latency, latest(group) as group by hostname, target_ip | eval events_status=case( events_loss==0, "✅ Healthy", events_loss>0 AND events_loss<50, "⚠️ Degraded", events_loss>=50 AND events_loss<100, "🔶 Critical", events_loss==100, "❌ Down" ) | join type=outer hostname [| mstats latest("ping.packet_loss_pct") as metrics_loss, latest("ping.avg_latency_ms") as metrics_latency WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" BY hostname | eval metrics_status=case( metrics_loss==0, "✅ Healthy", metrics_loss>0 AND metrics_loss<50, "⚠️ Degraded", metrics_loss>=50 AND metrics_loss<100, "🔶 Critical", metrics_loss==100, "❌ Down" )] | eval events_latency=round(events_latency, 2) | eval metrics_latency=round(metrics_latency, 2) | eval diff_loss=events_loss - coalesce(metrics_loss, 0) | eval diff_latency=events_latency - coalesce(metrics_latency, 0) | eval match=if(events_status==metrics_status, "✓", "⚠️ Mismatch") | table hostname, target_ip, group, events_status, metrics_status, match, events_loss, metrics_loss, events_latency, metrics_latency | rename events_status as "Events Status", metrics_status as "Metrics Status", match as "Match", events_loss as "Events Loss %", metrics_loss as "Metrics Loss %", events_latency as "Events Latency (ms)", metrics_latency as "Metrics Latency (ms)" | sort hostname

panel.title: 📊 Availability by Group - Events vs Metrics

search.query: index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats sum(pings_successful) as success, sum(pings_sent) as total by group | eval events_availability=round((success/total)*100, 2) | fields group, events_availability | join type=outer group [| mstats sum("ping.pings_successful") as success, sum("ping.pings_sent") as total WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" BY group | eval metrics_availability=round((success/total)*100, 2) | fields group, metrics_availability] | fillnull value=0 | rename events_availability as "Events", metrics_availability as "Metrics" | sort -Events

| makeresults | eval source="Events", index="$pm_index$", sourcetype="$pm_sourcetype$" | append [| makeresults | eval source="Metrics", index="$pm_metrics_index$", sourcetype="N/A (mstats)"] | join type=outer source [ search index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats count as event_count, dc(hostname) as hosts | eval source="Events"] | join type=outer source [ | mstats count("ping.pings_sent") as count WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" BY hostname | stats sum(count) as metric_count, dc(hostname) as metric_hosts | eval source="Metrics", event_count=metric_count, hosts=metric_hosts] | table source, index, hosts, event_count | rename source as "Source", index as "Index", hosts as "Hosts", event_count as "Data Points"

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary packet_loss_pct>0 ($selected_groups$) ($selected_hosts$) | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as events_loss, latest(avg_latency_ms) as events_latency, latest(group) as group by hostname, target_ip | eval source="Events" | append [| mstats latest("ping.packet_loss_pct") as metrics_loss, latest("ping.avg_latency_ms") as metrics_latency WHERE index="$pm_metrics_index$" BY hostname, target_ip, group | where metrics_loss > 0 | eval source="Metrics" | rename metrics_loss as events_loss, metrics_latency as events_latency] | eval status=case( events_loss>0 AND events_loss<50, "⚠️ Degraded", events_loss>=50 AND events_loss<100, "🔶 Critical", events_loss==100, "❌ Down" ) | eval events_latency=round(events_latency, 2) | table source, status, hostname, target_ip, group, events_loss, events_latency | rename source as "Source", status as "Status", events_loss as "Packet Loss %", events_latency as "Latency (ms)" | sort -"Packet Loss %"
